identity: Human MAN engineer, mid-30s, tall slender heroic adult build. Short dark hair, round brass goggles pushed up on forehead, soot-smudged face. Leather apron over dark tunic, copper-wire accents, tool-belt with wrenches and gears, leather boots. Muted browns and golds palette.
outfit: Leather apron over dark tunic, copper-wire accents, tool-belt with wrenches and gears, leather boots. No helm, no cape.
weapons: Small brass crossbow in right hand; mechanical grenade pouch at belt; portable turret gadget.
attackStyle: East-facing. Firing a small brass crossbow / hurling a mechanical grenade, right foot lunged forward. Clearly mid-strike.
spellStyle: East-facing. Holding up a glowing brass device with arcane sparks arcing between copper wires.
blockStyle: East-facing. Crouched behind a portable brass turret / free arm raised in guard.
koStyle: East-facing, slumped on side, tools scattered beside him.
southStyle: Facing camera, calm combat idle. Brass crossbow held at ready, tool-belt visible.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Short dark hair, brass goggles on forehead, soot-smudged face, leather apron, confident neutral expression.
